name: 06_Sentiment_Analysis_SVM_Sentiment140_ML
query: Tafadhali nisaidie kujenga mfumo wa uchambuzi wa hisia kwenye tweets ukitumia seti ya data ya Sentiment140 inayopatikana kutoka Hugging Face. Pakia seti ya data ya Sentiment140 na, wakati wa kupakia data, isafishe kwa kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia Word2Vec au GloVe kwa uvektaishaji wa maandishi. Hii inapaswa kufanyika katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tekeleza na funza kisanidi cha SVM katika `src/model.py`. Mwishowe, andika ripoti ya usahihi wa kisanidi kwenye `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`. Kwa kawaida, ripoti inapaswa kuwa rahisi kufasiri.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Sentiment140," inayopatikana kutoka "Hugging Face," inapatikana katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti ya data inasafishwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uwekaji wa maneno, ama "Word2Vec" au "GloVe," unatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa vekta katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kisanidi cha "SVM" kinatekelezwa na kufunzwa katika `src/model.py`.
Alama ya usahihi inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kupakua seti ya data unapaswa kuwa wa kuaminika, na uwe na utunzaji wa makosa wazi.
Ripoti ya mwisho ya usahihi inapaswa kuwa rahisi na rahisi kufasiri.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Sentiment140," inayopatikana kutoka "Hugging Face," inapatikana katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Sentiment140" dataset from Hugging Face. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no actual call to `datasets.load_dataset("sentiment140")` or any Hugging Face API. The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` variables, which is not a functional implementation. There is no import of the `datasets` library or any real data loading logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data inasafishwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa maneno ya kusimama, alama za uandishi, na herufi maalum, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and some notes, while `build_transforms()` returns a list of strings like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no actual code for cleaning data — no removal of stop words, punctuation, or special characters. The file is described explicitly as a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, confirming it does not perform any real data cleaning operations.

judge_stats.criteria: Uwekaji wa maneno, ama "Word2Vec" au "GloVe," unatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa vekta katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual Word2Vec or GloVe word embedding functionality. The file contains only a placeholder implementation — it lists "Word2Vec" and "GloVe" as strings within a `KEYWORDS` list and `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list for documentation purposes only. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real text-to-vector conversion. There is no import of libraries such as `gensim`, `torchtext`, or loading of pre-trained GloVe vectors, and no actual transformation of text data into numerical vectors is performed anywhere in the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Kisanidi cha "SVM" kinatekelezwa na kufunzwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement or train an actual SVM classifier. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no import of any SVM library (e.g., `sklearn.svm.SVC`), no data loading, no model training, and no actual SVM logic whatsoever.

judge_stats.criteria: Alama ya usahihi inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt` exists, but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — this is clearly a placeholder value, not an actual computed accuracy score. There is no evidence in the trajectory that the model was trained, evaluated, or that a real accuracy score was calculated and saved. The requirement to print and store a genuine accuracy score has not been fulfilled.
